subject: Dramatic Resolution penalty after M from relion auto-refine
body:
hey we have a protein that has a well ordered octomeric core with 
satellites that are poorly resolved. reviewers concerned about signal 
delocalization in our refinement of the octameric core. tried to use M to 
deal with signal delocalization but it all looks like poop (from 
auto-refine 6-7A res to M 24 A). please advise.

In order to avoid any bias, we did C1 for classifications and all that.
Also, uploading some relevant screenshots from Warp and M.
Please let me know if you would like to see any other info that I might've 
missed.
